CustomField.formula: CASE( Status__c , "Not Started", IMAGE("/resource/1712610585000/BlueButtonPNG?", "Not Started",30,30), "In Progress",IMAGE("/resource/1712610540000/YellowButtonPNG?", "In Progress",30,30), "Accepted", IMAGE("/resource/1712610566000/GreenButtonPNG?", "Accepted",30,30), "Rejected", IMAGE("/resource/1712610507000/RedButtonPNG?", "Rejected",30,30), "Not Applicable", IMAGE("/resource/1712610507000/RedButtonPNG?", "Not Applicable",30,30), IMAGE("/resource/1712610585000/BlueButtonPNG?", "Not Started",30,30))
CustomField.label: Status Indicator
